category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Tanzania) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Tanzania Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入坦桑尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入坦尚尼亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Tanzania requirements: TBS Pre-shipment Verification of Conformity (PVoC) and Certificate of Conformity, TZS/IEC 62133 cell safety, TCRA radio type approval, UN 38.3 transport, and in-country importer obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与坦桑尼亚要求对照：TBS装运前合格验证（PVoC）及合格证书、TZS/IEC 62133电芯安全、TCRA无线电型号核准、UN 38.3运输，以及当地进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與坦尚尼亞要求對照：TBS裝運前合格驗證（PVoC）及合格證書、TZS/IEC 62133電芯安全、TCRA無線電型號核准、UN 38.3運輸，以及當地進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Tanzania must obtain a TBS Certificate of Conformity under the Pre-shipment Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme where the product is regulated, demonstrate safety to TZS-adopted IEC 62133, obtain TCRA type approval for any wireless function, and provide UN 38.3 transport documentation — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification, and an in-country importer is required.
answer_first.zh: 向坦桑尼亚出口锂电池及移动电源的中国出口商，对受监管产品须依据装运前合格验证（PVoC）计划取得TBS合格证书，依据坦桑尼亚采纳的IEC 62133证明安全性，对任何无线功能取得TCRA型号核准，并提供UN 38.3运输文件——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代，且须有当地进口商。
answer_first.zht: 向坦尚尼亞出口鋰電池及行動電源的中國出口商，對受監管產品須依據裝運前合格驗證（PVoC）計劃取得TBS合格證書，依據坦尚尼亞採納的IEC 62133證明安全性，對任何無線功能取得TCRA型號核准，並提供UN 38.3運輸文件——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代，且須有當地進口商。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
